title: BlackBerry Q4 2023 Earnings Preview: 5 Things To Watch
text: BlackBerry was scheduled to report fourth-quarter fiscal 2023 results on March 30. The Zacks Consensus Estimate was pegged at a loss of 7 cents per share. For the fourth quarter, the company expected revenues of $151 million, with IoT, Cybersecurity, and licensing revenues likely to be $53 million, $88 million and $10 million, respectively. Investors should watch for five things, including BlackBerry's earnings forecast for Q4 and its potential performance in the cybersecurity and IoT sectors. Quarterly total revenues in the previous quarter had declined 8.2% year over year to $169 million. A material non-cash goodwill impairment charge for the Spark reporting unit was expected to be up to $440 million, primarily driven by the drastic stock market decline in 2022 and the corresponding impact on the company's market capitalization.
